description: Quality hardening for code structure, runtime state persistence, and analysis data surfaces.
behavioral_invariants: runtime state and plan files must be validated before execution
plan ownership and schema changes are backward-compatible with legacy projects
rollback_strategy: Pause between agents and revert code/state artifacts via git if validation regresses.

agents.name: state-schema-contract
agents.scope: Create versioned runtime state and plan schema contracts and validation entrypoints.

agents.name: state-integrity-checksum
agents.scope: Add checksum/version validation and guarded write behavior for state files.

agents.name: plan-normalization-hardened
agents.scope: Centralize plan defaults, migration, and backfill handling across plan loaders.

agents.name: analysis-cache-governance
agents.scope: Add cache schema metadata and corruption handling for analysis snapshots.

agents.name: db-health-command
agents.scope: Add machine-readable state, plan, and cache health reporting command.

agents.name: quality-tracker-docs
agents.scope: Publish quality tracker, risk log, and rollout guidance for this campaign.

conflicts: task_manager.py owns orchestration, validation, and persistence wiring in one runtime file
integration_steps: D and E consume these contracts.
F publishes campaign status after the execution surface is stable.

plan_elements.campaign_title: Quality hardening for code structure, runtime state persistence, and analysis data surfaces
plan_elements.goal_statement: Increase reliability by improving structure boundaries and adding integrity checks across runtime state, plan storage, and analysis cache snapshots.
exit_criteria: state and plan files validate deterministically
integrity command returns JSON with remediation suggestions
tests cover normal, corrupt, and recovery paths
docs tracker includes risks and rollout progress

agent_roster.name: state-schema-contract
agent_roster.scope: Create versioned runtime state and plan schema contracts and validation entrypoints.

agent_roster.name: state-integrity-checksum
agent_roster.scope: Add checksum/version validation and guarded write behavior for state files.

agent_roster.name: plan-normalization-hardened
agent_roster.scope: Centralize plan defaults, migration, and backfill handling across plan loaders.

agent_roster.name: analysis-cache-governance
agent_roster.scope: Add cache schema metadata and corruption handling for analysis snapshots.

agent_roster.name: db-health-command
agent_roster.scope: Add machine-readable state, plan, and cache health reporting command.

agent_roster.name: quality-tracker-docs
agent_roster.scope: Publish quality tracker, risk log, and rollout guidance for this campaign.

conflict_zone_analysis.reason: Separate persistence layers currently report diagnostics differently.

integration_points: A is the schema baseline for B/C/D/E.
C and D share migration behavior to keep plans and cache aligned.
F publishes residual risk after validation gates pass.

risk_assessment.risk: legacy snapshots fail under strict validation

verification_strategy: python -m pytest tests/test_state_persistence.py tests/test_state_edge_cases.py tests/test_cli_commands.py tests/test_parsing.py tests/test_analysis.py
